Machine Learning Engineer: We are looking for a Machine Learning Engineer skilled in Python, NumPy, pandas, scikit-learn, TensorFlow and data preprocessing. The candidate should understand machine learning algorithms, statistics, model training, and model deployment pipelines.
Build and optimize ML models using Python, TensorFlow and PyTorch. Experience with feature engineering, deep learning, data analysis and model evaluation required.
Data Scientist: Strong knowledge of Python, statistics, machine learning, SQL and data visualization tools such as matplotlib and seaborn. Experience with pandas, NumPy and exploratory data analysis required.
Analyze datasets, build predictive models and communicate insights using Python, machine learning techniques, data visualization and statistical analysis.
AI Engineer: Develop AI systems using Python, deep learning frameworks such as TensorFlow and PyTorch, natural language processing techniques and neural networks.
Design and deploy artificial intelligence solutions involving machine learning, NLP models, deep learning architectures and large datasets.
Backend Developer: Develop backend systems using Java, Spring Boot, REST APIs and SQL databases. Knowledge of microservices architecture, Docker and API security required.
Design scalable backend services using Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs and database integration with PostgreSQL or MongoDB.
Frontend Developer: Build responsive web interfaces using HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, React.js and modern UI frameworks such as Tailwind or Bootstrap.
Create dynamic user interfaces with React.js, TypeScript and modern frontend tooling. Experience with responsive design and web performance optimization.
Full Stack Developer: Develop full stack applications using JavaScript, React.js, Node.js, Express.js and MongoDB. Experience with REST APIs and Git version control required.
Work across frontend and backend technologies including React, Node.js, SQL databases and cloud deployment tools.
DevOps Engineer: Maintain CI/CD pipelines using Git, Docker, Kubernetes and cloud services such as AWS. Experience with Linux systems and automation tools required.
Implement infrastructure automation, container orchestration and continuous deployment using Docker, Kubernetes and cloud platforms.
Data Engineer: Design data pipelines using Python, SQL and big data frameworks. Experience with data warehousing, ETL processes and distributed systems required.
Build scalable data processing pipelines using Apache Spark, Python and SQL. Knowledge of database systems and data architecture required.
Mobile App Developer: Develop Android applications using Kotlin and modern Android SDK tools. Experience with REST APIs, UI design and mobile architecture required.
Build cross-platform mobile applications using Swift or Kotlin with strong understanding of mobile UI frameworks and API integration.
Cybersecurity Analyst: Monitor and analyze security threats using network security tools, intrusion detection systems and vulnerability assessment techniques.
Implement cybersecurity best practices, encryption protocols, security monitoring and incident response procedures.
Blockchain Developer: Develop decentralized applications using blockchain technology, smart contracts and distributed ledger systems.
Experience with blockchain platforms, cryptography, smart contracts and decentralized application architecture.
Database Administrator: Manage relational databases such as PostgreSQL and MySQL. Optimize queries, ensure database security and maintain database performance.
Design and maintain database systems, perform backups, optimize SQL queries and ensure high availability of data infrastructure.
Cloud Engineer: Deploy and manage cloud infrastructure using AWS or Azure services. Experience with containerization, Kubernetes and infrastructure automation.
Design scalable cloud systems using AWS services, networking, storage and cloud security best practices.
Software Engineer: Develop software applications using Java, Python or C++. Strong understanding of object-oriented programming, algorithms and system design.
Write clean, maintainable code while working with data structures, algorithms and version control using Git.
